measurement_note: Size is T, the total number of entries. Tier parameter L uses L identical arrays containing 1 through L, so T = L squared and the full sequence is common. The reference counts all T entries once. A correct slower implementation repeatedly linearly searches each current candidate in every next array, performs Theta(L cubed) = Theta(T to the 3/2) work, completes all legal tiers, and fails by scaling.
